------------------------------- MODULE Paxos_Refinement -------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS, TLC
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS Acceptors, Values, Quorums

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
          /\ Quorums \subseteq SUBSET Acceptors
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorums : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballots == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Values

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES msgs,
          maxBal,
          maxVBal,
          maxVal

vars == <<msgs, maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Send(m) == msgs' = msgs \cup {m}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init == /\ msgs = {}
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxBal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxVal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> None]

Phase1a(b) == /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "1a") /\ (m.bal = b)
              /\ Send([type |-> "1a", bal |-> b])
              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxBal, maxVal>>

Phase1b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
     /\ m.type = "1a"
     /\ m.bal > maxBal[a]
     /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
     /\ Send([type |-> "1b", bal |-> m.bal,
           maxVBal |-> maxVBal[a], maxVal |-> maxVal[a], acc |-> a])
     /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2a(b) ==
  /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "2a") /\ (m.bal = b)
  /\ \E v \in Values :
       /\ \E Q \in Quorums :
            \E S \in SUBSET {m \in msgs : (m.type = "1b") /\ (m.bal = b)} :
               /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in S : m.acc = a
               /\ \/ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal = -1
                  \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1) :
                        /\ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal =< c
                        /\ \E m \in S : /\ m.maxVBal = c
                                        /\ m.maxVal = v
       /\ Send([type |-> "2a", bal |-> b, val |-> v])
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
    /\ m.type = "2a"
    /\ m.bal >= maxBal[a]
    /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxVal' = [maxVal EXCEPT ![a] = m.val]
    /\ Send([type |-> "2b", bal |-> m.bal, val |-> m.val, acc |-> a])
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next == \/ \E b \in Ballots : Phase1a(b) \/ Phase2a(b)
        \/ \E a \in Acceptors : Phase1b(a) \/ Phase2b(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedForIn(a, v, b) == \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                       /\ m.val  = v
                                       /\ m.bal  = b
                                       /\ m.acc  = a

ChosenIn(v, b) == \E Q \in Quorums :
                     \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, b)

Chosen(v) == \E b \in Ballots : ChosenIn(v, b)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
chosenBar == {v \in Values : Chosen(v)}

C == INSTANCE Consensus WITH chosen <- chosenBar

\* ==========================================================================
\* Helper definitions and inductive invariant
\* ==========================================================================

Messages ==
       [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballots]
  \cup [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballots, maxVBal : Ballots \cup {-1},
        maxVal : Values \cup {None}, acc : Acceptors]
  \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values]
  \cup [type : {"2b"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values, acc : Acceptors]

TypeOK ==
  /\ msgs \subseteq Messages
  /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
  /\ maxBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
  /\ maxVal \in [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}]
  /\ \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]

WontVoteIn(a, b) ==
  /\ \A v \in Values : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  /\ maxBal[a] > b

SafeAt(v, b) ==
  \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
    \E Q \in Quorums :
      \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, c) \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)

MsgInv ==
  \A m \in msgs :
    /\ (m.type = "1b") =>
         /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
         /\ \/ (m.maxVBal = -1 /\ m.maxVal = None)
            \/ /\ m.maxVBal \in 0..(m.bal-1)
               /\ m.maxVal \in Values
               /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)
         /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1)..(m.bal-1) :
              ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
    /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
         /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)
         /\ \A mm \in msgs :
              (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
    /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
         /\ \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                             /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                             /\ mm.val = m.val
         /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]

AccInv ==
  \A a \in Acceptors :
    /\ (maxVBal[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal[a] = None)
    /\ (maxVal[a] # None) =>
         /\ maxVal[a] \in Values
         /\ maxVBal[a] \in Ballots
         /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
    /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] =>
         ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)

IndInv == TypeOK /\ MsgInv /\ AccInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Basic lemmas about VotedForIn

LEMMA VotedForInv ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, NEW a \in Acceptors, NEW v, NEW b, VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  PROVE  v \in Values /\ b \in Ballots
<1>1. PICK m \in msgs : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = v /\ m.bal = b /\ m.acc = a
      BY DEF VotedForIn
<1>2. m \in Messages BY DEF TypeOK
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Messages

LEMMA VotedInv ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW a \in Acceptors, NEW v, NEW b, VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  PROVE  /\ b \in Ballots
         /\ v \in Values
         /\ \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a" /\ mm.bal = b /\ mm.val = v
<1>1. PICK m \in msgs : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = v /\ m.bal = b /\ m.acc = a
      BY DEF VotedForIn
<1>2. m \in Messages BY DEF IndInv, TypeOK
<1>3. v \in Values /\ b \in Ballots BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Messages
<1>4. \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a" /\ mm.bal = b /\ mm.val = v
      BY <1>1 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
<1>. QED BY <1>3, <1>4

LEMMA VotedOnce ==
  ASSUME IndInv,
         NEW a1 \in Acceptors, NEW a2 \in Acceptors,
         NEW v1, NEW v2, NEW b,
         VotedForIn(a1, v1, b), VotedForIn(a2, v2, b)
  PROVE  v1 = v2
<1>1. PICK mm1 \in msgs : /\ mm1.type = "2a" /\ mm1.bal = b /\ mm1.val = v1
      BY VotedInv DEF IndInv
<1>2. PICK mm2 \in msgs : /\ mm2.type = "2a" /\ mm2.bal = b /\ mm2.val = v2
      BY VotedInv DEF IndInv
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF IndInv, MsgInv

LEMMA ChosenIsValue ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW v, Chosen(v)
  PROVE  v \in Values
<1>1. PICK b \in Ballots : ChosenIn(v, b) BY DEF Chosen
<1>2. PICK Q \in Quorums : \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, b)
      BY <1>1 DEF ChosenIn
<1>3. Q # {}
      <2>1. PICK Q2 \in Quorums : TRUE BY QuorumAssumption
      <2>2. Q \cap Q2 # {} BY <2>1, QuorumAssumption
      <2>. QED BY <2>2
<1>4. PICK a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, b) BY <1>2, <1>3
<1>5. a \in Acceptors BY <1>4, QuorumAssumption
<1>. QED BY VotedForInv, <1>4, <1>5 DEF IndInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Initial state lemma

LEMMA InitInv == Init => IndInv
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE IndInv OBVIOUS
<1>2. TypeOK
  <2>1. msgs \subseteq Messages BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>2. maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>3. maxBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>4. maxVal \in [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>5. \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3, <2>4, <2>5 DEF TypeOK
<1>3. MsgInv BY <1>1 DEF Init, MsgInv
<1>4. AccInv
  <2>1. \A a \in Acceptors : (maxVBal[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal[a] = None)
        BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>2. \A a \in Acceptors : (maxVal[a] # None) =>
            /\ maxVal[a] \in Values
            /\ maxVBal[a] \in Ballots
            /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
        BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>3. \A a \in Acceptors : \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] =>
            ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
    <3>1. \A a \in Acceptors, c, v: ~ VotedForIn(a, v, c)
          BY <1>1 DEF Init, VotedForIn
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3 DEF AccInv
<1>. QED BY <1>2, <1>3, <1>4 DEF IndInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Refinement == Spec => C!Spec
PROOF OBVIOUS
=============================================================================

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* VotedForIn and WontVoteIn preservation lemmas

LEMMA VotedForInMono ==
  ASSUME NEW a, NEW v, NEW b, VotedForIn(a, v, b), msgs \subseteq msgs'
  PROVE  VotedForIn(a, v, b)'
BY DEF VotedForIn

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Phase1a preserves the invariant

LEMMA Phase1aInv ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW b \in Ballots, Phase1a(b)
  PROVE  IndInv'
<1>1. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b]}
      BY DEF Phase1a, Send
<1>2. maxBal' = maxBal /\ maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVal' = maxVal
      BY DEF Phase1a
<1>3. TypeOK'
  <2>1. msgs' \subseteq Messages
        BY <1>1 DEF IndInv, TypeOK, Messages
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <1>2 DEF IndInv, TypeOK
<1>4. \A a \in Acceptors, vv, bb : VotedForIn(a, vv, bb) <=> VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors, NEW vv, NEW bb
                PROVE VotedForIn(a, vv, bb) <=> VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)'
        OBVIOUS
  <2>2. ASSUME VotedForIn(a, vv, bb) PROVE VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)'
        BY <1>1, <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
  <2>3. ASSUME VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)' PROVE VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)
        <3>1. PICK m \in msgs' : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = vv /\ m.bal = bb /\ m.acc = a
              BY <2>3 DEF VotedForIn
        <3>2. m \in msgs BY <1>1, <3>1
        <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF VotedForIn
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>3
<1>5. \A a, bb : WontVoteIn(a, bb) <=> WontVoteIn(a, bb)'
      BY <1>2, <1>4 DEF WontVoteIn
<1>6. \A vv, bb : SafeAt(vv, bb) <=> SafeAt(vv, bb)'
      BY <1>4, <1>5 DEF SafeAt
<1>7. MsgInv'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW m \in msgs' PROVE
          /\ (m.type = "1b") =>
               /\ m.bal =< maxBal'[m.acc]
               /\ \/ (m.maxVBal = -1 /\ m.maxVal = None)
                  \/ /\ m.maxVBal \in 0..(m.bal-1)
                     /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                     /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
               /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1)..(m.bal-1) :
                    ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
          /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
               /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
               /\ \A mm \in msgs' :
                    (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
          /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
               /\ \E mm \in msgs' : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                                    /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                                    /\ mm.val = m.val
               /\ m.bal =< maxVBal'[m.acc]
        BY DEF MsgInv
  <2>2. CASE m.type = "1a"
        BY <2>2
  <2>3. CASE m \in msgs
    <3>1. CASE m.type = "1b"
          BY <3>1, <2>3, <1>2, <1>4 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
    <3>2. CASE m.type = "2a"
      <4>1. SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
            BY <3>2, <2>3, <1>6 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>2. \A mm \in msgs' : (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
        <5>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW mm \in msgs', mm.type = "2a", mm.bal = m.bal
                       PROVE mm.val = m.val
              OBVIOUS
        <5>2. mm \in msgs
              BY <1>1, <5>1
        <5>. QED BY <2>3, <3>2, <5>1, <5>2 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>. QED BY <3>2, <4>1, <4>2
    <3>3. CASE m.type = "2b"
      <4>1. \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                             /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                             /\ mm.val = m.val
            BY <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>2. m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc] BY <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>. QED BY <3>3, <4>1, <4>2, <1>1, <1>2
    <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, TypeOK, Messages
  <2>4. CASE m \notin msgs
    <3>1. m = [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b]
          BY <1>1, <2>4
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>3, <2>4, <1>1
<1>8. AccInv'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors PROVE
          /\ (maxVBal'[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal'[a] = None)
          /\ (maxVal'[a] # None) =>
               /\ maxVal'[a] \in Values
               /\ maxVBal'[a] \in Ballots
               /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal'[a], maxVBal'[a])'
          /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal'[a] =>
               ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
        BY DEF AccInv
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <1>2, <1>4 DEF IndInv, AccInv
<1>. QED BY <1>3, <1>7, <1>8 DEF IndInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Refinement == Spec => C!Spec
PROOF OBVIOUS
=============================================================================

tool_use_result.originalFile:
------------------------------- MODULE Paxos_Refinement -------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS, TLC
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS Acceptors, Values, Quorums

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
          /\ Quorums \subseteq SUBSET Acceptors
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorums : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballots == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Values

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES msgs,
          maxBal,
          maxVBal,
          maxVal

vars == <<msgs, maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Send(m) == msgs' = msgs \cup {m}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init == /\ msgs = {}
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxBal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxVal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> None]

Phase1a(b) == /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "1a") /\ (m.bal = b)
              /\ Send([type |-> "1a", bal |-> b])
              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxBal, maxVal>>

Phase1b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
     /\ m.type = "1a"
     /\ m.bal > maxBal[a]
     /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
     /\ Send([type |-> "1b", bal |-> m.bal,
           maxVBal |-> maxVBal[a], maxVal |-> maxVal[a], acc |-> a])
     /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2a(b) ==
  /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "2a") /\ (m.bal = b)
  /\ \E v \in Values :
       /\ \E Q \in Quorums :
            \E S \in SUBSET {m \in msgs : (m.type = "1b") /\ (m.bal = b)} :
               /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in S : m.acc = a
               /\ \/ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal = -1
                  \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1) :
                        /\ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal =< c
                        /\ \E m \in S : /\ m.maxVBal = c
                                        /\ m.maxVal = v
       /\ Send([type |-> "2a", bal |-> b, val |-> v])
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
    /\ m.type = "2a"
    /\ m.bal >= maxBal[a]
    /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxVal' = [maxVal EXCEPT ![a] = m.val]
    /\ Send([type |-> "2b", bal |-> m.bal, val |-> m.val, acc |-> a])
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next == \/ \E b \in Ballots : Phase1a(b) \/ Phase2a(b)
        \/ \E a \in Acceptors : Phase1b(a) \/ Phase2b(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedForIn(a, v, b) == \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                       /\ m.val  = v
                                       /\ m.bal  = b
                                       /\ m.acc  = a

ChosenIn(v, b) == \E Q \in Quorums :
                     \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, b)

Chosen(v) == \E b \in Ballots : ChosenIn(v, b)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
chosenBar == {v \in Values : Chosen(v)}

C == INSTANCE Consensus WITH chosen <- chosenBar

\* ==========================================================================
\* Helper definitions and inductive invariant
\* ==========================================================================

Messages ==
       [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballots]
  \cup [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballots, maxVBal : Ballots \cup {-1},
        maxVal : Values \cup {None}, acc : Acceptors]
  \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values]
  \cup [type : {"2b"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values, acc : Acceptors]

TypeOK ==
  /\ msgs \subseteq Messages
  /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
  /\ maxBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
  /\ maxVal \in [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}]
  /\ \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]

WontVoteIn(a, b) ==
  /\ \A v \in Values : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  /\ maxBal[a] > b

SafeAt(v, b) ==
  \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
    \E Q \in Quorums :
      \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, c) \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)

MsgInv ==
  \A m \in msgs :
    /\ (m.type = "1b") =>
         /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
         /\ \/ (m.maxVBal = -1 /\ m.maxVal = None)
            \/ /\ m.maxVBal \in 0..(m.bal-1)
               /\ m.maxVal \in Values
               /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)
         /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1)..(m.bal-1) :
              ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
    /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
         /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)
         /\ \A mm \in msgs :
              (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
    /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
         /\ \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                             /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                             /\ mm.val = m.val
         /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]

AccInv ==
  \A a \in Acceptors :
    /\ (maxVBal[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal[a] = None)
    /\ (maxVal[a] # None) =>
         /\ maxVal[a] \in Values
         /\ maxVBal[a] \in Ballots
         /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
    /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] =>
         ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)

IndInv == TypeOK /\ MsgInv /\ AccInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Basic lemmas about VotedForIn

LEMMA VotedForInv ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, NEW a \in Acceptors, NEW v, NEW b, VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  PROVE  v \in Values /\ b \in Ballots
<1>1. PICK m \in msgs : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = v /\ m.bal = b /\ m.acc = a
      BY DEF VotedForIn
<1>2. m \in Messages BY DEF TypeOK
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Messages

LEMMA VotedInv ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW a \in Acceptors, NEW v, NEW b, VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  PROVE  /\ b \in Ballots
         /\ v \in Values
         /\ \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a" /\ mm.bal = b /\ mm.val = v
<1>1. PICK m \in msgs : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = v /\ m.bal = b /\ m.acc = a
      BY DEF VotedForIn
<1>2. m \in Messages BY DEF IndInv, TypeOK
<1>3. v \in Values /\ b \in Ballots BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Messages
<1>4. \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a" /\ mm.bal = b /\ mm.val = v
      BY <1>1 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
<1>. QED BY <1>3, <1>4

LEMMA VotedOnce ==
  ASSUME IndInv,
         NEW a1 \in Acceptors, NEW a2 \in Acceptors,
         NEW v1, NEW v2, NEW b,
         VotedForIn(a1, v1, b), VotedForIn(a2, v2, b)
  PROVE  v1 = v2
<1>1. PICK mm1 \in msgs : /\ mm1.type = "2a" /\ mm1.bal = b /\ mm1.val = v1
      BY VotedInv DEF IndInv
<1>2. PICK mm2 \in msgs : /\ mm2.type = "2a" /\ mm2.bal = b /\ mm2.val = v2
      BY VotedInv DEF IndInv
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF IndInv, MsgInv

LEMMA ChosenIsValue ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW v, Chosen(v)
  PROVE  v \in Values
<1>1. PICK b \in Ballots : ChosenIn(v, b) BY DEF Chosen
<1>2. PICK Q \in Quorums : \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, b)
      BY <1>1 DEF ChosenIn
<1>3. Q # {}
      <2>1. PICK Q2 \in Quorums : TRUE BY QuorumAssumption
      <2>2. Q \cap Q2 # {} BY <2>1, QuorumAssumption
      <2>. QED BY <2>2
<1>4. PICK a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, b) BY <1>2, <1>3
<1>5. a \in Acceptors BY <1>4, QuorumAssumption
<1>. QED BY VotedForInv, <1>4, <1>5 DEF IndInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Initial state lemma

LEMMA InitInv == Init => IndInv
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE IndInv OBVIOUS
<1>2. TypeOK
  <2>1. msgs \subseteq Messages BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>2. maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>3. maxBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>4. maxVal \in [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>5. \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3, <2>4, <2>5 DEF TypeOK
<1>3. MsgInv BY <1>1 DEF Init, MsgInv
<1>4. AccInv
  <2>1. \A a \in Acceptors : (maxVBal[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal[a] = None)
        BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>2. \A a \in Acceptors : (maxVal[a] # None) =>
            /\ maxVal[a] \in Values
            /\ maxVBal[a] \in Ballots
            /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
        BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>3. \A a \in Acceptors : \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] =>
            ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
    <3>1. \A a \in Acceptors : \A c, v : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, c)
          BY <1>1 DEF Init, VotedForIn
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3 DEF AccInv
<1>. QED BY <1>2, <1>3, <1>4 DEF IndInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Refinement == Spec => C!Spec
PROOF OBVIOUS
=============================================================================

tool_use_result.originalFile:
------------------------------- MODULE Paxos_Refinement -------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS, TLC
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS Acceptors, Values, Quorums

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
          /\ Quorums \subseteq SUBSET Acceptors
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorums : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballots == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Values

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES msgs,
          maxBal,
          maxVBal,
          maxVal

vars == <<msgs, maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Send(m) == msgs' = msgs \cup {m}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init == /\ msgs = {}
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxBal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxVal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> None]

Phase1a(b) == /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "1a") /\ (m.bal = b)
              /\ Send([type |-> "1a", bal |-> b])
              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxBal, maxVal>>

Phase1b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
     /\ m.type = "1a"
     /\ m.bal > maxBal[a]
     /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
     /\ Send([type |-> "1b", bal |-> m.bal,
           maxVBal |-> maxVBal[a], maxVal |-> maxVal[a], acc |-> a])
     /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2a(b) ==
  /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "2a") /\ (m.bal = b)
  /\ \E v \in Values :
       /\ \E Q \in Quorums :
            \E S \in SUBSET {m \in msgs : (m.type = "1b") /\ (m.bal = b)} :
               /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in S : m.acc = a
               /\ \/ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal = -1
                  \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1) :
                        /\ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal =< c
                        /\ \E m \in S : /\ m.maxVBal = c
                                        /\ m.maxVal = v
       /\ Send([type |-> "2a", bal |-> b, val |-> v])
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
    /\ m.type = "2a"
    /\ m.bal >= maxBal[a]
    /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxVal' = [maxVal EXCEPT ![a] = m.val]
    /\ Send([type |-> "2b", bal |-> m.bal, val |-> m.val, acc |-> a])
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next == \/ \E b \in Ballots : Phase1a(b) \/ Phase2a(b)
        \/ \E a \in Acceptors : Phase1b(a) \/ Phase2b(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedForIn(a, v, b) == \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                       /\ m.val  = v
                                       /\ m.bal  = b
                                       /\ m.acc  = a

ChosenIn(v, b) == \E Q \in Quorums :
                     \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, b)

Chosen(v) == \E b \in Ballots : ChosenIn(v, b)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
chosenBar == {v \in Values : Chosen(v)}

C == INSTANCE Consensus WITH chosen <- chosenBar

\* ==========================================================================
\* Helper definitions and inductive invariant
\* ==========================================================================

Messages ==
       [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballots]
  \cup [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballots, maxVBal : Ballots \cup {-1},
        maxVal : Values \cup {None}, acc : Acceptors]
  \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values]
  \cup [type : {"2b"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values, acc : Acceptors]

TypeOK ==
  /\ msgs \subseteq Messages
  /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
  /\ maxBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
  /\ maxVal \in [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}]
  /\ \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]

WontVoteIn(a, b) ==
  /\ \A v \in Values : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  /\ maxBal[a] > b

SafeAt(v, b) ==
  \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
    \E Q \in Quorums :
      \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, c) \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)

MsgInv ==
  \A m \in msgs :
    /\ (m.type = "1b") =>
         /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
         /\ \/ (m.maxVBal = -1 /\ m.maxVal = None)
            \/ /\ m.maxVBal \in 0..(m.bal-1)
               /\ m.maxVal \in Values
               /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)
         /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1)..(m.bal-1) :
              ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
    /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
         /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)
         /\ \A mm \in msgs :
              (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
    /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
         /\ \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                             /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                             /\ mm.val = m.val
         /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]

AccInv ==
  \A a \in Acceptors :
    /\ (maxVBal[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal[a] = None)
    /\ (maxVal[a] # None) =>
         /\ maxVal[a] \in Values
         /\ maxVBal[a] \in Ballots
         /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
    /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] =>
         ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)

IndInv == TypeOK /\ MsgInv /\ AccInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Basic lemmas about VotedForIn

LEMMA VotedForInv ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, NEW a \in Acceptors, NEW v, NEW b, VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  PROVE  v \in Values /\ b \in Ballots
<1>1. PICK m \in msgs : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = v /\ m.bal = b /\ m.acc = a
      BY DEF VotedForIn
<1>2. m \in Messages BY DEF TypeOK
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Messages

LEMMA VotedInv ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW a \in Acceptors, NEW v, NEW b, VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  PROVE  /\ b \in Ballots
         /\ v \in Values
         /\ \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a" /\ mm.bal = b /\ mm.val = v
<1>1. PICK m \in msgs : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = v /\ m.bal = b /\ m.acc = a
      BY DEF VotedForIn
<1>2. m \in Messages BY DEF IndInv, TypeOK
<1>3. v \in Values /\ b \in Ballots BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Messages
<1>4. \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a" /\ mm.bal = b /\ mm.val = v
      BY <1>1 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
<1>. QED BY <1>3, <1>4

LEMMA VotedOnce ==
  ASSUME IndInv,
         NEW a1 \in Acceptors, NEW a2 \in Acceptors,
         NEW v1, NEW v2, NEW b,
         VotedForIn(a1, v1, b), VotedForIn(a2, v2, b)
  PROVE  v1 = v2
<1>1. PICK mm1 \in msgs : /\ mm1.type = "2a" /\ mm1.bal = b /\ mm1.val = v1
      BY VotedInv DEF IndInv
<1>2. PICK mm2 \in msgs : /\ mm2.type = "2a" /\ mm2.bal = b /\ mm2.val = v2
      BY VotedInv DEF IndInv
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF IndInv, MsgInv

LEMMA ChosenIsValue ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW v, Chosen(v)
  PROVE  v \in Values
<1>1. PICK b \in Ballots : ChosenIn(v, b) BY DEF Chosen
<1>2. PICK Q \in Quorums : \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, b)
      BY <1>1 DEF ChosenIn
<1>3. Q # {}
      <2>1. PICK Q2 \in Quorums : TRUE BY QuorumAssumption
      <2>2. Q \cap Q2 # {} BY <2>1, QuorumAssumption
      <2>. QED BY <2>2
<1>4. PICK a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, b) BY <1>2, <1>3
<1>5. a \in Acceptors BY <1>4, QuorumAssumption
<1>. QED BY VotedForInv, <1>4, <1>5 DEF IndInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Initial state lemma

LEMMA InitInv == Init => IndInv
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE IndInv OBVIOUS
<1>2. TypeOK
  <2>1. msgs \subseteq Messages BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>2. maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>3. maxBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>4. maxVal \in [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>5. \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3, <2>4, <2>5 DEF TypeOK
<1>3. MsgInv BY <1>1 DEF Init, MsgInv
<1>4. AccInv
  <2>1. \A a \in Acceptors : (maxVBal[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal[a] = None)
        BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>2. \A a \in Acceptors : (maxVal[a] # None) =>
            /\ maxVal[a] \in Values
            /\ maxVBal[a] \in Ballots
            /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
        BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>3. \A a \in Acceptors : \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] =>
            ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
    <3>1. \A a \in Acceptors : \A c, v : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, c)
          BY <1>1 DEF Init, VotedForIn
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3 DEF AccInv
<1>. QED BY <1>2, <1>3, <1>4 DEF IndInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* VotedForIn and WontVoteIn preservation lemmas

LEMMA VotedForInMono ==
  ASSUME NEW a, NEW v, NEW b, VotedForIn(a, v, b), msgs \subseteq msgs'
  PROVE  VotedForIn(a, v, b)'
BY DEF VotedForIn

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Phase1a preserves the invariant

LEMMA Phase1aInv ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW b \in Ballots, Phase1a(b)
  PROVE  IndInv'
<1>1. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b]}
      BY DEF Phase1a, Send
<1>2. maxBal' = maxBal /\ maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVal' = maxVal
      BY DEF Phase1a
<1>3. TypeOK'
  <2>1. msgs' \subseteq Messages
        BY <1>1 DEF IndInv, TypeOK, Messages
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <1>2 DEF IndInv, TypeOK
<1>4. \A a \in Acceptors, vv, bb : VotedForIn(a, vv, bb) <=> VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors, NEW vv, NEW bb
                PROVE VotedForIn(a, vv, bb) <=> VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)'
        OBVIOUS
  <2>2. ASSUME VotedForIn(a, vv, bb) PROVE VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)'
        BY <1>1, <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
  <2>3. ASSUME VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)' PROVE VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)
        <3>1. PICK m \in msgs' : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = vv /\ m.bal = bb /\ m.acc = a
              BY <2>3 DEF VotedForIn
        <3>2. m \in msgs BY <1>1, <3>1
        <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF VotedForIn
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>3
<1>5. \A a, bb : WontVoteIn(a, bb) <=> WontVoteIn(a, bb)'
      BY <1>2, <1>4 DEF WontVoteIn
<1>6. \A vv, bb : SafeAt(vv, bb) <=> SafeAt(vv, bb)'
      BY <1>4, <1>5 DEF SafeAt
<1>7. MsgInv'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW m \in msgs' PROVE
          /\ (m.type = "1b") =>
               /\ m.bal =< maxBal'[m.acc]
               /\ \/ (m.maxVBal = -1 /\ m.maxVal = None)
                  \/ /\ m.maxVBal \in 0..(m.bal-1)
                     /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                     /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
               /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1)..(m.bal-1) :
                    ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
          /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
               /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
               /\ \A mm \in msgs' :
                    (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
          /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
               /\ \E mm \in msgs' : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                                    /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                                    /\ mm.val = m.val
               /\ m.bal =< maxVBal'[m.acc]
        BY DEF MsgInv
  <2>2. CASE m.type = "1a"
        BY <2>2
  <2>3. CASE m \in msgs
    <3>1. CASE m.type = "1b"
          BY <3>1, <2>3, <1>2, <1>4 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
    <3>2. CASE m.type = "2a"
      <4>1. SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
            BY <3>2, <2>3, <1>6 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>2. \A mm \in msgs' : (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
        <5>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW mm \in msgs', mm.type = "2a", mm.bal = m.bal
                       PROVE mm.val = m.val
              OBVIOUS
        <5>2. mm \in msgs
              BY <1>1, <5>1
        <5>. QED BY <2>3, <3>2, <5>1, <5>2 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>. QED BY <3>2, <4>1, <4>2
    <3>3. CASE m.type = "2b"
      <4>1. \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                             /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                             /\ mm.val = m.val
            BY <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>2. m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc] BY <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>. QED BY <3>3, <4>1, <4>2, <1>1, <1>2
    <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, TypeOK, Messages
  <2>4. CASE m \notin msgs
    <3>1. m = [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b]
          BY <1>1, <2>4
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>3, <2>4, <1>1
<1>8. AccInv'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors PROVE
          /\ (maxVBal'[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal'[a] = None)
          /\ (maxVal'[a] # None) =>
               /\ maxVal'[a] \in Values
               /\ maxVBal'[a] \in Ballots
               /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal'[a], maxVBal'[a])'
          /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal'[a] =>
               ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
        BY DEF AccInv
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <1>2, <1>4 DEF IndInv, AccInv
<1>. QED BY <1>3, <1>7, <1>8 DEF IndInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Refinement == Spec => C!Spec
PROOF OBVIOUS
=============================================================================

content.text: The tlapm crash is from level issues in mixing primed/unprimed. Let me restructure the proof:

input.old_string:
LEMMA Phase1aInv ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW b \in Ballots, Phase1a(b)
  PROVE  IndInv'
<1>1. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b]}
      BY DEF Phase1a, Send
<1>2. maxBal' = maxBal /\ maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVal' = maxVal
      BY DEF Phase1a
<1>3. TypeOK'
  <2>1. msgs' \subseteq Messages
        BY <1>1 DEF IndInv, TypeOK, Messages
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <1>2 DEF IndInv, TypeOK
<1>4. \A a \in Acceptors : \A vv, bb : VotedForIn(a, vv, bb) <=> VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors, NEW vv, NEW bb
                PROVE VotedForIn(a, vv, bb) <=> VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)'
        OBVIOUS
  <2>2. ASSUME VotedForIn(a, vv, bb) PROVE VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)'
        BY <1>1, <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
  <2>3. ASSUME VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)' PROVE VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)
        <3>1. PICK m \in msgs' : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = vv /\ m.bal = bb /\ m.acc = a
              BY <2>3 DEF VotedForIn
        <3>2. m \in msgs BY <1>1, <3>1
        <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF VotedForIn
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>3
<1>5. \A a, bb : WontVoteIn(a, bb) <=> WontVoteIn(a, bb)'
      BY <1>2, <1>4 DEF WontVoteIn
<1>6. \A vv, bb : SafeAt(vv, bb) <=> SafeAt(vv, bb)'
      BY <1>4, <1>5 DEF SafeAt
<1>7. MsgInv'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW m \in msgs' PROVE
          /\ (m.type = "1b") =>
               /\ m.bal =< maxBal'[m.acc]
               /\ \/ (m.maxVBal = -1 /\ m.maxVal = None)
                  \/ /\ m.maxVBal \in 0..(m.bal-1)
                     /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                     /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
               /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1)..(m.bal-1) :
                    ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
          /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
               /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
               /\ \A mm \in msgs' :
                    (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
          /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
               /\ \E mm \in msgs' : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                                    /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                                    /\ mm.val = m.val
               /\ m.bal =< maxVBal'[m.acc]
        BY DEF MsgInv
  <2>2. CASE m.type = "1a"
        BY <2>2
  <2>3. CASE m \in msgs
    <3>1. CASE m.type = "1b"
          BY <3>1, <2>3, <1>2, <1>4 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
    <3>2. CASE m.type = "2a"
      <4>1. SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
            BY <3>2, <2>3, <1>6 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>2. \A mm \in msgs' : (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
        <5>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW mm \in msgs', mm.type = "2a", mm.bal = m.bal
                       PROVE mm.val = m.val
              OBVIOUS
        <5>2. mm \in msgs
              BY <1>1, <5>1
        <5>. QED BY <2>3, <3>2, <5>1, <5>2 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>. QED BY <3>2, <4>1, <4>2
    <3>3. CASE m.type = "2b"
      <4>1. \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                             /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                             /\ mm.val = m.val
            BY <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>2. m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc] BY <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>. QED BY <3>3, <4>1, <4>2, <1>1, <1>2
    <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, TypeOK, Messages
  <2>4. CASE m \notin msgs
    <3>1. m = [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b]
          BY <1>1, <2>4
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>3, <2>4, <1>1
<1>8. AccInv'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors PROVE
          /\ (maxVBal'[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal'[a] = None)
          /\ (maxVal'[a] # None) =>
               /\ maxVal'[a] \in Values
               /\ maxVBal'[a] \in Ballots
               /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal'[a], maxVBal'[a])'
          /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal'[a] =>
               ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
        BY DEF AccInv
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <1>2, <1>4 DEF IndInv, AccInv
<1>. QED BY <1>3, <1>7, <1>8 DEF IndInv
input.new_string:
LEMMA Phase1aInv ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW b \in Ballots, Phase1a(b)
  PROVE  IndInv'
<1>1. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b]}
      BY DEF Phase1a, Send
<1>2. maxBal' = maxBal /\ maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVal' = maxVal
      BY DEF Phase1a
<1>m. msgs \subseteq msgs' BY <1>1
<1>3. TypeOK'
  <2>1. msgs' \subseteq Messages
        BY <1>1 DEF IndInv, TypeOK, Messages
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <1>2 DEF IndInv, TypeOK
<1>7. MsgInv'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW m \in msgs' PROVE
          /\ (m.type = "1b") =>
               /\ m.bal =< maxBal'[m.acc]
               /\ \/ (m.maxVBal = -1 /\ m.maxVal = None)
                  \/ /\ m.maxVBal \in 0..(m.bal-1)
                     /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                     /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
               /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1)..(m.bal-1) :
                    ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
          /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
               /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
               /\ \A mm \in msgs' :
                    (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
          /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
               /\ \E mm \in msgs' : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                                    /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                                    /\ mm.val = m.val
               /\ m.bal =< maxVBal'[m.acc]
        BY DEF MsgInv
  <2>VFI. \A x \in Acceptors, vv, bb : VotedForIn(x, vv, bb) => VotedForIn(x, vv, bb)'
          BY <1>m DEF VotedForIn
  <2>VFI2. \A x, vv, bb : VotedForIn(x, vv, bb)' => VotedForIn(x, vv, bb)
        <3>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW x, NEW vv, NEW bb, VotedForIn(x, vv, bb)'
                      PROVE VotedForIn(x, vv, bb)
              OBVIOUS
        <3>2. PICK mm \in msgs' : mm.type = "2b" /\ mm.val = vv /\ mm.bal = bb /\ mm.acc = x
              BY <3>1 DEF VotedForIn
        <3>3. mm \in msgs
              <4>1. mm # [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b]
                    BY <3>2
              <4>. QED BY <1>1, <3>2, <4>1
        <3>. QED BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF VotedForIn
  <2>WV. \A x \in Acceptors, bb : WontVoteIn(x, bb) => WontVoteIn(x, bb)'
         BY <1>2, <2>VFI2 DEF WontVoteIn
  <2>SA. \A vv, bb : SafeAt(vv, bb) => SafeAt(vv, bb)'
        <3>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW vv, NEW bb, SafeAt(vv, bb)
                       PROVE  SafeAt(vv, bb)'
              OBVIOUS
        <3>2. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in 0..(bb-1)
                       PROVE \E Q \in Quorums :
                               \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, vv, c)' \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)'
              BY DEF SafeAt
        <3>3. PICK Q \in Quorums : \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, vv, c) \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)
              BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF SafeAt
        <3>4. Q \subseteq Acceptors BY QuorumAssumption
        <3>. QED BY <3>3, <3>4, <2>VFI, <2>WV
  <2>2. CASE m.type = "1a"
        BY <2>2
  <2>3. CASE m \in msgs
    <3>1. CASE m.type = "1b"
      <4>0. m \in Messages BY <2>3 DEF IndInv, TypeOK
      <4>1. m.acc \in Acceptors BY <4>0, <3>1 DEF Messages
      <4>2. m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc] BY <3>1, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>3. \/ (m.maxVBal = -1 /\ m.maxVal = None)
            \/ /\ m.maxVBal \in 0..(m.bal-1)
               /\ m.maxVal \in Values
               /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)
            BY <3>1, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>4. \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1)..(m.bal-1) :
                 ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
            BY <3>1, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>5. m.bal =< maxBal'[m.acc] BY <4>2, <1>2
      <4>6. \/ (m.maxVBal = -1 /\ m.maxVal = None)
            \/ /\ m.maxVBal \in 0..(m.bal-1)
               /\ m.maxVal \in Values
               /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
            BY <4>3, <4>1, <2>VFI
      <4>7. \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1)..(m.bal-1) :
                 ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
            BY <4>4, <2>VFI2
      <4>. QED BY <3>1, <4>5, <4>6, <4>7
    <3>2. CASE m.type = "2a"
      <4>0. m \in Messages BY <2>3 DEF IndInv, TypeOK
      <4>00. m.val \in Values /\ m.bal \in Ballots BY <4>0, <3>2 DEF Messages
      <4>1. SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
            BY <3>2, <2>3, <2>SA, <4>00 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>2. \A mm \in msgs' : (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
        <5>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW mm \in msgs', mm.type = "2a", mm.bal = m.bal
                       PROVE mm.val = m.val
              OBVIOUS
        <5>2. mm \in msgs
              <6>1. mm # [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b] BY <5>1
              <6>. QED BY <1>1, <5>1, <6>1
        <5>. QED BY <2>3, <3>2, <5>1, <5>2 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>. QED BY <3>2, <4>1, <4>2
    <3>3. CASE m.type = "2b"
      <4>0. m \in Messages BY <2>3 DEF IndInv, TypeOK
      <4>1. m.acc \in Acceptors BY <4>0, <3>3 DEF Messages
      <4>2. \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                             /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                             /\ mm.val = m.val
            BY <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>3. m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc] BY <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>. QED BY <3>3, <4>2, <4>3, <1>1, <1>2
    <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, TypeOK, Messages
  <2>4. CASE m \notin msgs
    <3>1. m = [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b]
          BY <1>1, <2>4
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>3, <2>4, <1>1
<1>8. AccInv'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors PROVE
          /\ (maxVBal'[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal'[a] = None)
          /\ (maxVal'[a] # None) =>
               /\ maxVal'[a] \in Values
               /\ maxVBal'[a] \in Ballots
               /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal'[a], maxVBal'[a])'
          /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal'[a] =>
               ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
        BY DEF AccInv
  <2>2. (maxVBal'[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal'[a] = None) BY <1>2 DEF IndInv, AccInv
  <2>3. (maxVal'[a] # None) =>
               /\ maxVal'[a] \in Values
               /\ maxVBal'[a] \in Ballots
               /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal'[a], maxVBal'[a])'
    <3>1. SUFFICES ASSUME maxVal'[a] # None
                   PROVE /\ maxVal'[a] \in Values
                         /\ maxVBal'[a] \in Ballots
                         /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal'[a], maxVBal'[a])'
          OBVIOUS
    <3>2. maxVal[a] # None BY <3>1, <1>2
    <3>3. /\ maxVal[a] \in Values
          /\ maxVBal[a] \in Ballots
          /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
          BY <3>2 DEF IndInv, AccInv
    <3>4. VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])'
          <4>1. PICK mm \in msgs : mm.type = "2b" /\ mm.val = maxVal[a] /\ mm.bal = maxVBal[a] /\ mm.acc = a
                BY <3>3 DEF VotedForIn
          <4>. QED BY <4>1, <1>m DEF VotedForIn
    <3>. QED BY <3>3, <3>4, <1>2
  <2>4. \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal'[a] =>
               ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
    <3>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in Ballots, c > maxVBal'[a],
                          NEW v \in Values, VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
                   PROVE FALSE
          OBVIOUS
    <3>2. PICK mm \in msgs' : mm.type = "2b" /\ mm.val = v /\ mm.bal = c /\ mm.acc = a
          BY <3>1 DEF VotedForIn
    <3>3. mm # [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b] BY <3>2
    <3>4. mm \in msgs BY <1>1, <3>2, <3>3
    <3>5. VotedForIn(a, v, c) BY <3>2, <3>4 DEF VotedForIn

<1>8. AccInv'

  <2>3. (maxVal'[a] # None) =>

               /\ maxVBal'[a] \in Ballots

          OBVIOUS

          BY <3>2 DEF IndInv, AccInv
    <3>4. VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])'

    <3>3. mm # [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b] BY <3>2

tool_use_result.originalFile:
------------------------------- MODULE Paxos_Refinement -------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS, TLC
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS Acceptors, Values, Quorums

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
          /\ Quorums \subseteq SUBSET Acceptors
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorums : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballots == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Values

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES msgs,
          maxBal,
          maxVBal,
          maxVal

vars == <<msgs, maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Send(m) == msgs' = msgs \cup {m}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init == /\ msgs = {}
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxBal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxVal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> None]

Phase1a(b) == /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "1a") /\ (m.bal = b)
              /\ Send([type |-> "1a", bal |-> b])
              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxBal, maxVal>>

Phase1b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
     /\ m.type = "1a"
     /\ m.bal > maxBal[a]
     /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
     /\ Send([type |-> "1b", bal |-> m.bal,
           maxVBal |-> maxVBal[a], maxVal |-> maxVal[a], acc |-> a])
     /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2a(b) ==
  /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "2a") /\ (m.bal = b)
  /\ \E v \in Values :
       /\ \E Q \in Quorums :
            \E S \in SUBSET {m \in msgs : (m.type = "1b") /\ (m.bal = b)} :
               /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in S : m.acc = a
               /\ \/ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal = -1
                  \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1) :
                        /\ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal =< c
                        /\ \E m \in S : /\ m.maxVBal = c
                                        /\ m.maxVal = v
       /\ Send([type |-> "2a", bal |-> b, val |-> v])
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
    /\ m.type = "2a"
    /\ m.bal >= maxBal[a]
    /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxVal' = [maxVal EXCEPT ![a] = m.val]
    /\ Send([type |-> "2b", bal |-> m.bal, val |-> m.val, acc |-> a])
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next == \/ \E b \in Ballots : Phase1a(b) \/ Phase2a(b)
        \/ \E a \in Acceptors : Phase1b(a) \/ Phase2b(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedForIn(a, v, b) == \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                       /\ m.val  = v
                                       /\ m.bal  = b
                                       /\ m.acc  = a

ChosenIn(v, b) == \E Q \in Quorums :
                     \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, b)

Chosen(v) == \E b \in Ballots : ChosenIn(v, b)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
chosenBar == {v \in Values : Chosen(v)}

C == INSTANCE Consensus WITH chosen <- chosenBar

\* ==========================================================================
\* Helper definitions and inductive invariant
\* ==========================================================================

Messages ==
       [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballots]
  \cup [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballots, maxVBal : Ballots \cup {-1},
        maxVal : Values \cup {None}, acc : Acceptors]
  \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values]
  \cup [type : {"2b"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values, acc : Acceptors]

TypeOK ==
  /\ msgs \subseteq Messages
  /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
  /\ maxBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
  /\ maxVal \in [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}]
  /\ \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]

WontVoteIn(a, b) ==
  /\ \A v \in Values : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  /\ maxBal[a] > b

SafeAt(v, b) ==
  \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
    \E Q \in Quorums :
      \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, c) \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)

MsgInv ==
  \A m \in msgs :
    /\ (m.type = "1b") =>
         /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
         /\ \/ (m.maxVBal = -1 /\ m.maxVal = None)
            \/ /\ m.maxVBal \in 0..(m.bal-1)
               /\ m.maxVal \in Values
               /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)
         /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1)..(m.bal-1) :
              ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
    /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
         /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)
         /\ \A mm \in msgs :
              (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
    /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
         /\ \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                             /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                             /\ mm.val = m.val
         /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]

AccInv ==
  \A a \in Acceptors :
    /\ (maxVBal[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal[a] = None)
    /\ (maxVal[a] # None) =>
         /\ maxVal[a] \in Values
         /\ maxVBal[a] \in Ballots
         /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
    /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] =>
         ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)

IndInv == TypeOK /\ MsgInv /\ AccInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Basic lemmas about VotedForIn

LEMMA VotedForInv ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, NEW a \in Acceptors, NEW v, NEW b, VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  PROVE  v \in Values /\ b \in Ballots
<1>1. PICK m \in msgs : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = v /\ m.bal = b /\ m.acc = a
      BY DEF VotedForIn
<1>2. m \in Messages BY DEF TypeOK
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Messages

LEMMA VotedInv ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW a \in Acceptors, NEW v, NEW b, VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  PROVE  /\ b \in Ballots
         /\ v \in Values
         /\ \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a" /\ mm.bal = b /\ mm.val = v
<1>1. PICK m \in msgs : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = v /\ m.bal = b /\ m.acc = a
      BY DEF VotedForIn
<1>2. m \in Messages BY DEF IndInv, TypeOK
<1>3. v \in Values /\ b \in Ballots BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Messages
<1>4. \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a" /\ mm.bal = b /\ mm.val = v
      BY <1>1 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
<1>. QED BY <1>3, <1>4

LEMMA VotedOnce ==
  ASSUME IndInv,
         NEW a1 \in Acceptors, NEW a2 \in Acceptors,
         NEW v1, NEW v2, NEW b,
         VotedForIn(a1, v1, b), VotedForIn(a2, v2, b)
  PROVE  v1 = v2
<1>1. PICK mm1 \in msgs : /\ mm1.type = "2a" /\ mm1.bal = b /\ mm1.val = v1
      BY VotedInv DEF IndInv
<1>2. PICK mm2 \in msgs : /\ mm2.type = "2a" /\ mm2.bal = b /\ mm2.val = v2
      BY VotedInv DEF IndInv
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF IndInv, MsgInv

LEMMA ChosenIsValue ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW v, Chosen(v)
  PROVE  v \in Values
<1>1. PICK b \in Ballots : ChosenIn(v, b) BY DEF Chosen
<1>2. PICK Q \in Quorums : \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, b)
      BY <1>1 DEF ChosenIn
<1>3. Q # {}
      <2>1. PICK Q2 \in Quorums : TRUE BY QuorumAssumption
      <2>2. Q \cap Q2 # {} BY <2>1, QuorumAssumption
      <2>. QED BY <2>2
<1>4. PICK a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, b) BY <1>2, <1>3
<1>5. a \in Acceptors BY <1>4, QuorumAssumption
<1>. QED BY VotedForInv, <1>4, <1>5 DEF IndInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Initial state lemma

LEMMA InitInv == Init => IndInv
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE IndInv OBVIOUS
<1>2. TypeOK
  <2>1. msgs \subseteq Messages BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>2. maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>3. maxBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>4. maxVal \in [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>5. \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3, <2>4, <2>5 DEF TypeOK
<1>3. MsgInv BY <1>1 DEF Init, MsgInv
<1>4. AccInv
  <2>1. \A a \in Acceptors : (maxVBal[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal[a] = None)
        BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>2. \A a \in Acceptors : (maxVal[a] # None) =>
            /\ maxVal[a] \in Values
            /\ maxVBal[a] \in Ballots
            /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
        BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>3. \A a \in Acceptors : \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] =>
            ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
    <3>1. \A a \in Acceptors : \A c, v : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, c)
          BY <1>1 DEF Init, VotedForIn
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3 DEF AccInv
<1>. QED BY <1>2, <1>3, <1>4 DEF IndInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* VotedForIn and WontVoteIn preservation lemmas

LEMMA VotedForInMono ==
  ASSUME NEW a, NEW v, NEW b, VotedForIn(a, v, b), msgs \subseteq msgs'
  PROVE  VotedForIn(a, v, b)'
BY DEF VotedForIn

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Phase1a preserves the invariant

LEMMA Phase1aInv ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW b \in Ballots, Phase1a(b)
  PROVE  IndInv'
<1>1. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b]}
      BY DEF Phase1a, Send
<1>2. maxBal' = maxBal /\ maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVal' = maxVal
      BY DEF Phase1a
<1>3. TypeOK'
  <2>1. msgs' \subseteq Messages
        BY <1>1 DEF IndInv, TypeOK, Messages
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <1>2 DEF IndInv, TypeOK
<1>4. \A a \in Acceptors : \A vv, bb : VotedForIn(a, vv, bb) <=> VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors, NEW vv, NEW bb
                PROVE VotedForIn(a, vv, bb) <=> VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)'
        OBVIOUS
  <2>2. ASSUME VotedForIn(a, vv, bb) PROVE VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)'
        BY <1>1, <2>2 DEF VotedForIn
  <2>3. ASSUME VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)' PROVE VotedForIn(a, vv, bb)
        <3>1. PICK m \in msgs' : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = vv /\ m.bal = bb /\ m.acc = a
              BY <2>3 DEF VotedForIn
        <3>2. m \in msgs BY <1>1, <3>1
        <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF VotedForIn
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>3
<1>5. \A a, bb : WontVoteIn(a, bb) <=> WontVoteIn(a, bb)'
      BY <1>2, <1>4 DEF WontVoteIn
<1>6. \A vv, bb : SafeAt(vv, bb) <=> SafeAt(vv, bb)'
      BY <1>4, <1>5 DEF SafeAt
<1>7. MsgInv'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW m \in msgs' PROVE
          /\ (m.type = "1b") =>
               /\ m.bal =< maxBal'[m.acc]
               /\ \/ (m.maxVBal = -1 /\ m.maxVal = None)
                  \/ /\ m.maxVBal \in 0..(m.bal-1)
                     /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                     /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
               /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1)..(m.bal-1) :
                    ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
          /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
               /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
               /\ \A mm \in msgs' :
                    (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
          /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
               /\ \E mm \in msgs' : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                                    /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                                    /\ mm.val = m.val
               /\ m.bal =< maxVBal'[m.acc]
        BY DEF MsgInv
  <2>2. CASE m.type = "1a"
        BY <2>2
  <2>3. CASE m \in msgs
    <3>1. CASE m.type = "1b"
          BY <3>1, <2>3, <1>2, <1>4 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
    <3>2. CASE m.type = "2a"
      <4>1. SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
            BY <3>2, <2>3, <1>6 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>2. \A mm \in msgs' : (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
        <5>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW mm \in msgs', mm.type = "2a", mm.bal = m.bal
                       PROVE mm.val = m.val
              OBVIOUS
        <5>2. mm \in msgs
              BY <1>1, <5>1
        <5>. QED BY <2>3, <3>2, <5>1, <5>2 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>. QED BY <3>2, <4>1, <4>2
    <3>3. CASE m.type = "2b"
      <4>1. \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                             /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                             /\ mm.val = m.val
            BY <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>2. m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc] BY <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>. QED BY <3>3, <4>1, <4>2, <1>1, <1>2
    <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, TypeOK, Messages
  <2>4. CASE m \notin msgs
    <3>1. m = [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b]
          BY <1>1, <2>4
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>3, <2>4, <1>1
<1>8. AccInv'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors PROVE
          /\ (maxVBal'[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal'[a] = None)
          /\ (maxVal'[a] # None) =>
               /\ maxVal'[a] \in Values
               /\ maxVBal'[a] \in Ballots
               /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal'[a], maxVBal'[a])'
          /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal'[a] =>
               ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
        BY DEF AccInv
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <1>2, <1>4 DEF IndInv, AccInv
<1>. QED BY <1>3, <1>7, <1>8 DEF IndInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Refinement == Spec => C!Spec
PROOF OBVIOUS
=============================================================================

tool_use_result.originalFile:
------------------------------- MODULE Paxos_Refinement -------------------------------

EXTENDS Integers, TLAPS, TLC
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS Acceptors, Values, Quorums

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
          /\ Quorums \subseteq SUBSET Acceptors
          /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorums : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballots == Nat

None == CHOOSE v : v \notin Values

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES msgs,
          maxBal,
          maxVBal,
          maxVal

vars == <<msgs, maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Send(m) == msgs' = msgs \cup {m}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init == /\ msgs = {}
        /\ maxVBal = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxBal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> -1]
        /\ maxVal  = [a \in Acceptors |-> None]

Phase1a(b) == /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "1a") /\ (m.bal = b)
              /\ Send([type |-> "1a", bal |-> b])
              /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxBal, maxVal>>

Phase1b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
     /\ m.type = "1a"
     /\ m.bal > maxBal[a]
     /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
     /\ Send([type |-> "1b", bal |-> m.bal,
           maxVBal |-> maxVBal[a], maxVal |-> maxVal[a], acc |-> a])
     /\ UNCHANGED <<maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2a(b) ==
  /\ ~ \E m \in msgs : (m.type = "2a") /\ (m.bal = b)
  /\ \E v \in Values :
       /\ \E Q \in Quorums :
            \E S \in SUBSET {m \in msgs : (m.type = "1b") /\ (m.bal = b)} :
               /\ \A a \in Q : \E m \in S : m.acc = a
               /\ \/ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal = -1
                  \/ \E c \in 0..(b-1) :
                        /\ \A m \in S : m.maxVBal =< c
                        /\ \E m \in S : /\ m.maxVBal = c
                                        /\ m.maxVal = v
       /\ Send([type |-> "2a", bal |-> b, val |-> v])
  /\ UNCHANGED <<maxBal, maxVBal, maxVal>>

Phase2b(a) ==
  \E m \in msgs :
    /\ m.type = "2a"
    /\ m.bal >= maxBal[a]
    /\ maxVBal' = [maxVBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = m.bal]
    /\ maxVal' = [maxVal EXCEPT ![a] = m.val]
    /\ Send([type |-> "2b", bal |-> m.bal, val |-> m.val, acc |-> a])
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next == \/ \E b \in Ballots : Phase1a(b) \/ Phase2a(b)
        \/ \E a \in Acceptors : Phase1b(a) \/ Phase2b(a)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedForIn(a, v, b) == \E m \in msgs : /\ m.type = "2b"
                                       /\ m.val  = v
                                       /\ m.bal  = b
                                       /\ m.acc  = a

ChosenIn(v, b) == \E Q \in Quorums :
                     \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, b)

Chosen(v) == \E b \in Ballots : ChosenIn(v, b)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
chosenBar == {v \in Values : Chosen(v)}

C == INSTANCE Consensus WITH chosen <- chosenBar

\* ==========================================================================
\* Helper definitions and inductive invariant
\* ==========================================================================

Messages ==
       [type : {"1a"}, bal : Ballots]
  \cup [type : {"1b"}, bal : Ballots, maxVBal : Ballots \cup {-1},
        maxVal : Values \cup {None}, acc : Acceptors]
  \cup [type : {"2a"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values]
  \cup [type : {"2b"}, bal : Ballots, val : Values, acc : Acceptors]

TypeOK ==
  /\ msgs \subseteq Messages
  /\ maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
  /\ maxBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}]
  /\ maxVal \in [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}]
  /\ \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a]

WontVoteIn(a, b) ==
  /\ \A v \in Values : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  /\ maxBal[a] > b

SafeAt(v, b) ==
  \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
    \E Q \in Quorums :
      \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, c) \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)

MsgInv ==
  \A m \in msgs :
    /\ (m.type = "1b") =>
         /\ m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc]
         /\ \/ (m.maxVBal = -1 /\ m.maxVal = None)
            \/ /\ m.maxVBal \in 0..(m.bal-1)
               /\ m.maxVal \in Values
               /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)
         /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1)..(m.bal-1) :
              ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
    /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
         /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)
         /\ \A mm \in msgs :
              (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
    /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
         /\ \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                             /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                             /\ mm.val = m.val
         /\ m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc]

AccInv ==
  \A a \in Acceptors :
    /\ (maxVBal[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal[a] = None)
    /\ (maxVal[a] # None) =>
         /\ maxVal[a] \in Values
         /\ maxVBal[a] \in Ballots
         /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
    /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] =>
         ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)

IndInv == TypeOK /\ MsgInv /\ AccInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Basic lemmas about VotedForIn

LEMMA VotedForInv ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, NEW a \in Acceptors, NEW v, NEW b, VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  PROVE  v \in Values /\ b \in Ballots
<1>1. PICK m \in msgs : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = v /\ m.bal = b /\ m.acc = a
      BY DEF VotedForIn
<1>2. m \in Messages BY DEF TypeOK
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Messages

LEMMA VotedInv ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW a \in Acceptors, NEW v, NEW b, VotedForIn(a, v, b)
  PROVE  /\ b \in Ballots
         /\ v \in Values
         /\ \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a" /\ mm.bal = b /\ mm.val = v
<1>1. PICK m \in msgs : m.type = "2b" /\ m.val = v /\ m.bal = b /\ m.acc = a
      BY DEF VotedForIn
<1>2. m \in Messages BY DEF IndInv, TypeOK
<1>3. v \in Values /\ b \in Ballots BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Messages
<1>4. \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a" /\ mm.bal = b /\ mm.val = v
      BY <1>1 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
<1>. QED BY <1>3, <1>4

LEMMA VotedOnce ==
  ASSUME IndInv,
         NEW a1 \in Acceptors, NEW a2 \in Acceptors,
         NEW v1, NEW v2, NEW b,
         VotedForIn(a1, v1, b), VotedForIn(a2, v2, b)
  PROVE  v1 = v2
<1>1. PICK mm1 \in msgs : /\ mm1.type = "2a" /\ mm1.bal = b /\ mm1.val = v1
      BY VotedInv DEF IndInv
<1>2. PICK mm2 \in msgs : /\ mm2.type = "2a" /\ mm2.bal = b /\ mm2.val = v2
      BY VotedInv DEF IndInv
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF IndInv, MsgInv

LEMMA ChosenIsValue ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW v, Chosen(v)
  PROVE  v \in Values
<1>1. PICK b \in Ballots : ChosenIn(v, b) BY DEF Chosen
<1>2. PICK Q \in Quorums : \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, b)
      BY <1>1 DEF ChosenIn
<1>3. Q # {}
      <2>1. PICK Q2 \in Quorums : TRUE BY QuorumAssumption
      <2>2. Q \cap Q2 # {} BY <2>1, QuorumAssumption
      <2>. QED BY <2>2
<1>4. PICK a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, v, b) BY <1>2, <1>3
<1>5. a \in Acceptors BY <1>4, QuorumAssumption
<1>. QED BY VotedForInv, <1>4, <1>5 DEF IndInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Initial state lemma

LEMMA InitInv == Init => IndInv
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME Init PROVE IndInv OBVIOUS
<1>2. TypeOK
  <2>1. msgs \subseteq Messages BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>2. maxVBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>3. maxBal \in [Acceptors -> Ballots \cup {-1}] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>4. maxVal \in [Acceptors -> Values \cup {None}] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>5. \A a \in Acceptors : maxBal[a] >= maxVBal[a] BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3, <2>4, <2>5 DEF TypeOK
<1>3. MsgInv BY <1>1 DEF Init, MsgInv
<1>4. AccInv
  <2>1. \A a \in Acceptors : (maxVBal[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal[a] = None)
        BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>2. \A a \in Acceptors : (maxVal[a] # None) =>
            /\ maxVal[a] \in Values
            /\ maxVBal[a] \in Ballots
            /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
        BY <1>1 DEF Init
  <2>3. \A a \in Acceptors : \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal[a] =>
            ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)
    <3>1. \A a \in Acceptors : \A c, v : ~ VotedForIn(a, v, c)
          BY <1>1 DEF Init, VotedForIn
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3 DEF AccInv
<1>. QED BY <1>2, <1>3, <1>4 DEF IndInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* VotedForIn and WontVoteIn preservation lemmas

LEMMA VotedForInMono ==
  ASSUME NEW a, NEW v, NEW b, VotedForIn(a, v, b), msgs \subseteq msgs'
  PROVE  VotedForIn(a, v, b)'
BY DEF VotedForIn

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Phase1a preserves the invariant

LEMMA Phase1aInv ==
  ASSUME IndInv, NEW b \in Ballots, Phase1a(b)
  PROVE  IndInv'
<1>1. msgs' = msgs \cup {[type |-> "1a", bal |-> b]}
      BY DEF Phase1a, Send
<1>2. maxBal' = maxBal /\ maxVBal' = maxVBal /\ maxVal' = maxVal
      BY DEF Phase1a
<1>m. msgs \subseteq msgs' BY <1>1
<1>3. TypeOK'
  <2>1. msgs' \subseteq Messages
        BY <1>1 DEF IndInv, TypeOK, Messages
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <1>2 DEF IndInv, TypeOK
<1>7. MsgInv'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW m \in msgs' PROVE
          /\ (m.type = "1b") =>
               /\ m.bal =< maxBal'[m.acc]
               /\ \/ (m.maxVBal = -1 /\ m.maxVal = None)
                  \/ /\ m.maxVBal \in 0..(m.bal-1)
                     /\ m.maxVal \in Values
                     /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
               /\ \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1)..(m.bal-1) :
                    ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
          /\ (m.type = "2a") =>
               /\ SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
               /\ \A mm \in msgs' :
                    (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
          /\ (m.type = "2b") =>
               /\ \E mm \in msgs' : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                                    /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                                    /\ mm.val = m.val
               /\ m.bal =< maxVBal'[m.acc]
        BY DEF MsgInv
  <2>VFI. \A x \in Acceptors, vv, bb : VotedForIn(x, vv, bb) => VotedForIn(x, vv, bb)'
          BY <1>m DEF VotedForIn
  <2>VFI2. \A x, vv, bb : VotedForIn(x, vv, bb)' => VotedForIn(x, vv, bb)
        <3>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW x, NEW vv, NEW bb, VotedForIn(x, vv, bb)'
                      PROVE VotedForIn(x, vv, bb)
              OBVIOUS
        <3>2. PICK mm \in msgs' : mm.type = "2b" /\ mm.val = vv /\ mm.bal = bb /\ mm.acc = x
              BY <3>1 DEF VotedForIn
        <3>3. mm \in msgs
              <4>1. mm # [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b]
                    BY <3>2
              <4>. QED BY <1>1, <3>2, <4>1
        <3>. QED BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF VotedForIn
  <2>WV. \A x \in Acceptors, bb : WontVoteIn(x, bb) => WontVoteIn(x, bb)'
         BY <1>2, <2>VFI2 DEF WontVoteIn
  <2>SA. \A vv, bb : SafeAt(vv, bb) => SafeAt(vv, bb)'
        <3>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW vv, NEW bb, SafeAt(vv, bb)
                       PROVE  SafeAt(vv, bb)'
              OBVIOUS
        <3>2. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in 0..(bb-1)
                       PROVE \E Q \in Quorums :
                               \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, vv, c)' \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)'
              BY DEF SafeAt
        <3>3. PICK Q \in Quorums : \A a \in Q : VotedForIn(a, vv, c) \/ WontVoteIn(a, c)
              BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF SafeAt
        <3>4. Q \subseteq Acceptors BY QuorumAssumption
        <3>. QED BY <3>3, <3>4, <2>VFI, <2>WV
  <2>2. CASE m.type = "1a"
        BY <2>2
  <2>3. CASE m \in msgs
    <3>1. CASE m.type = "1b"
      <4>0. m \in Messages BY <2>3 DEF IndInv, TypeOK
      <4>1. m.acc \in Acceptors BY <4>0, <3>1 DEF Messages
      <4>2. m.bal =< maxBal[m.acc] BY <3>1, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>3. \/ (m.maxVBal = -1 /\ m.maxVal = None)
            \/ /\ m.maxVBal \in 0..(m.bal-1)
               /\ m.maxVal \in Values
               /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)
            BY <3>1, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>4. \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1)..(m.bal-1) :
                 ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)
            BY <3>1, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>5. m.bal =< maxBal'[m.acc] BY <4>2, <1>2
      <4>6. \/ (m.maxVBal = -1 /\ m.maxVal = None)
            \/ /\ m.maxVBal \in 0..(m.bal-1)
               /\ m.maxVal \in Values
               /\ VotedForIn(m.acc, m.maxVal, m.maxVBal)'
            BY <4>3, <4>1, <2>VFI
      <4>7. \A c \in (m.maxVBal+1)..(m.bal-1) :
                 ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(m.acc, v, c)'
            BY <4>4, <2>VFI2
      <4>. QED BY <3>1, <4>5, <4>6, <4>7
    <3>2. CASE m.type = "2a"
      <4>0. m \in Messages BY <2>3 DEF IndInv, TypeOK
      <4>00. m.val \in Values /\ m.bal \in Ballots BY <4>0, <3>2 DEF Messages
      <4>1. SafeAt(m.val, m.bal)'
            BY <3>2, <2>3, <2>SA, <4>00 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>2. \A mm \in msgs' : (mm.type = "2a") /\ (mm.bal = m.bal) => mm.val = m.val
        <5>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW mm \in msgs', mm.type = "2a", mm.bal = m.bal
                       PROVE mm.val = m.val
              OBVIOUS
        <5>2. mm \in msgs
              <6>1. mm # [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b] BY <5>1
              <6>. QED BY <1>1, <5>1, <6>1
        <5>. QED BY <2>3, <3>2, <5>1, <5>2 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>. QED BY <3>2, <4>1, <4>2
    <3>3. CASE m.type = "2b"
      <4>0. m \in Messages BY <2>3 DEF IndInv, TypeOK
      <4>1. m.acc \in Acceptors BY <4>0, <3>3 DEF Messages
      <4>2. \E mm \in msgs : /\ mm.type = "2a"
                             /\ mm.bal = m.bal
                             /\ mm.val = m.val
            BY <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>3. m.bal =< maxVBal[m.acc] BY <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, MsgInv
      <4>. QED BY <3>3, <4>2, <4>3, <1>1, <1>2
    <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>2, <3>3, <2>3 DEF IndInv, TypeOK, Messages
  <2>4. CASE m \notin msgs
    <3>1. m = [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b]
          BY <1>1, <2>4
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>3, <2>4, <1>1
<1>8. AccInv'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptors PROVE
          /\ (maxVBal'[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal'[a] = None)
          /\ (maxVal'[a] # None) =>
               /\ maxVal'[a] \in Values
               /\ maxVBal'[a] \in Ballots
               /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal'[a], maxVBal'[a])'
          /\ \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal'[a] =>
               ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
        BY DEF AccInv
  <2>2. (maxVBal'[a] = -1) <=> (maxVal'[a] = None) BY <1>2 DEF IndInv, AccInv
  <2>3. (maxVal'[a] # None) =>
               /\ maxVal'[a] \in Values
               /\ maxVBal'[a] \in Ballots
               /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal'[a], maxVBal'[a])'
    <3>1. SUFFICES ASSUME maxVal'[a] # None
                   PROVE /\ maxVal'[a] \in Values
                         /\ maxVBal'[a] \in Ballots
                         /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal'[a], maxVBal'[a])'
          OBVIOUS
    <3>2. maxVal[a] # None BY <3>1, <1>2
    <3>3. /\ maxVal[a] \in Values
          /\ maxVBal[a] \in Ballots
          /\ VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])
          BY <3>2 DEF IndInv, AccInv
    <3>4. VotedForIn(a, maxVal[a], maxVBal[a])'
          <4>1. PICK mm \in msgs : mm.type = "2b" /\ mm.val = maxVal[a] /\ mm.bal = maxVBal[a] /\ mm.acc = a
                BY <3>3 DEF VotedForIn
          <4>. QED BY <4>1, <1>m DEF VotedForIn
    <3>. QED BY <3>3, <3>4, <1>2
  <2>4. \A c \in Ballots : c > maxVBal'[a] =>
               ~ \E v \in Values : VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
    <3>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in Ballots, c > maxVBal'[a],
                          NEW v \in Values, VotedForIn(a, v, c)'
                   PROVE FALSE
          OBVIOUS
    <3>2. PICK mm \in msgs' : mm.type = "2b" /\ mm.val = v /\ mm.bal = c /\ mm.acc = a
          BY <3>1 DEF VotedForIn
    <3>3. mm # [type |-> "1a", bal |-> b] BY <3>2
    <3>4. mm \in msgs BY <1>1, <3>2, <3>3
    <3>5. VotedForIn(a, v, c) BY <3>2, <3>4 DEF VotedForIn
    <3>6. c > maxVBal[a] BY <3>1, <1>2
    <3>. QED BY <3>5, <3>6 DEF IndInv, AccInv
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>3, <2>4
<1>. QED BY <1>3, <1>7, <1>8 DEF IndInv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Refinement == Spec => C!Spec
PROOF OBVIOUS
=============================================================================
